# 18 — Docs and Handoff Update

<context-hint>
Use after any major implementation cycle.
</context-hint>

<task>
Act as Docs Agent. Update project state and handoff without bloating docs.
</task>

<instructions>
1. Read `.github/agents/bjt.docs.agent.md`, `docs/spec/index.md`, and only digest/compact files relevant to the changed area.
2. Read changed files and latest reports.
3. Update `company/PROJECT_STATE.md` in digest form.
4. Update `company/COMPANY_BACKLOG.md` statuses.
5. Update `company/SPRINT_BOARD.md`.
6. Update `company/AGENT_HANDOFF.md`.
7. Add decision log entries if architectural decisions changed.
</instructions>
